calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation

Petition For Reformation Of Trust
To Correct Drafting Error

Petition For Reformation Of Trust
To Correct Drafting Error
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Aug-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Michael Freedman, for Nicole M. Angiuli, Petitioner.
Peter Myers, for Alesandro Cortara, interested party.
Thomas LaLanne, for Salvatore Cortara, interested party.

At the outset, the court acknowledges the objection that is pending in the e-filing queue. This and the related matters are discussed as well as mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Jul-30-2026. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Aug-10-2026. The matter is continued to Aug-17-2026 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.
